artifact_summary: Screenshot of the HSP Motor Group LLS Manager SCADA interface displaying a split view of seven motor statuses, demand availability, and asset running metrics.
artifact_key_elements: HSP Motor Group LLS Manager title
artifact_blurb: A SCADA system dashboard titled 'HSP Motor Group LLS Manager' presenting a dual-panel layout. The left section enumerates demand status and available motor inventory, while the right section visualizes the count of active assets via a line graph, with specific indicators denoting motor readiness and current running states for a total of seven monitored units.
